testcase.name: test_adopt_products_count

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected at least 20 adopt products, got 16 assert 16 >= 20 + where 16 = len([{'base_tags': {'benefits': [], 'breed_size': [], 'category_primary': 'services', 'category_secondary': '', ...}, 'category': 'feed', 'created_at': '2026-01-30T16:48:28.530+00:00', 'description': 'Age-appropriate nutrition guidance for growing puppies', ...}, {'base_tags': {'benefits': ['training_support'], 'breed_size': [], 'category_primary': 'services', 'category_secondary': '', ...}, 'category': 'training', 'created_at': '2026-01-31T10:41:14.650118+00:00', 'description': '8-week foundation training', ...}, {'advisory_type': 'new_pet', 'base_tags': {'benefits': [], 'breed_size': [], 'category_primary': 'accessories', 'category_secondary': '', ...}, 'category': 'advisory', 'compare_price': 2499, ...}, {'base_tags': {'benefits': [], 'breed_size': [], 'category_primary': 'services', 'category_secondary': '', ...}, 'category': 'socialisation', 'created_at': '2026-01-26T21:16:09.132843+00:00', 'description': 'Structured socialisation programme for puppies during critical development period.', ...}, {'base_tags': {'benefits': [], 'breed_size': [], 'category_primary': 'services', 'category_secondary': '', ...}, 'category': 'puppy', 'created_at': '2026-01-26T21:16:09.130645+00:00', 'description': 'Age-appropriate exercise and development programme for growing puppies.', ...}, {'base_tags': {'benefits': [], 'breed_size': [], 'category_primary': 'services', 'category_secondary': '', ...}, 'category': 'milestone', 'created_at': '2026-01-26T21:16:09.096886+00:00', 'description': "Mark your puppy's transition to adulthood with a special ceremony. Includes growth photo compilation and celebration.", ...}, ...])

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_167_seeding.py:127: in test_adopt_products_count assert len(products) >= 20, f"Expected at least 20 adopt products, got {len(products)}" E AssertionError: Expected at least 20 adopt products, got 16 E assert 16 >= 20 E + where 16 = len([{'base_tags': {'benefits': [], 'breed_size': [], 'category_primary': 'services', 'category_secondary': '', ...}, 'category': 'feed', 'created_at': '2026-01-30T16:48:28.530+00:00', 'description': 'Age-appropriate nutrition guidance for growing puppies', ...}, {'base_tags': {'benefits': ['training_support'], 'breed_size': [], 'category_primary': 'services', 'category_secondary': '', ...}, 'category': 'training', 'created_at': '2026-01-31T10:41:14.650118+00:00', 'description': '8-week foundation training', ...}, {'advisory_type': 'new_pet', 'base_tags': {'benefits': [], 'breed_size': [], 'category_primary': 'accessories', 'category_secondary': '', ...}, 'category': 'advisory', 'compare_price': 2499, ...}, {'base_tags': {'benefits': [], 'breed_size': [], 'category_primary': 'services', 'category_secondary': '', ...}, 'category': 'socialisation', 'created_at': '2026-01-26T21:16:09.132843+00:00', 'description': 'Structured socialisation programme for puppies during critical development period.', ...}, {'base_tags': {'benefits': [], 'breed_size': [], 'category_primary': 'services', 'category_secondary': '', ...}, 'category': 'puppy', 'created_at': '2026-01-26T21:16:09.130645+00:00', 'description': 'Age-appropriate exercise and development programme for growing puppies.', ...}, {'base_tags': {'benefits': [], 'breed_size': [], 'category_primary': 'services', 'category_secondary': '', ...}, 'category': 'milestone', 'created_at': '2026-01-26T21:16:09.096886+00:00', 'description': "Mark your puppy's transition to adulthood with a special ceremony. Includes growth photo compilation and celebration.", ...}, ...])

testcase.name: test_stay_route_products
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_167_seeding.py:235: in test_stay_route_products assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_total_services_count

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected at least 80 total services, got 50 assert 50 >= 80

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_167_seeding.py:293: in test_total_services_count assert total >= 80, f"Expected at least 80 total services, got {total}" E AssertionError: Expected at least 80 total services, got 50 E assert 50 >= 80

testcase.name: test_services_by_pillar_distribution

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected services in at least 10 pillars, got 8 assert 8 >= 10 + where 8 = len({'care': 12, 'celebrate': 7, 'dine': 5, 'enjoy': 5, ...})

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_167_seeding.py:314: in test_services_by_pillar_distribution assert len(pillar_counts) >= 10, f"Expected services in at least 10 pillars, got {len(pillar_counts)}" E AssertionError: Expected services in at least 10 pillars, got 8 E assert 8 >= 10 E + where 8 = len({'care': 12, 'celebrate': 7, 'dine': 5, 'enjoy': 5, ...})
